concepts.title: Metric spaces
concepts.blurb: Distance axioms, open balls, ε-continuity, Cauchy sequences and completeness — the ε–δ archetype before topology gets abstracted.

concepts.title: Topological spaces
concepts.blurb: A topology as a family of open sets closed under arbitrary unions and finite intersections; bases, subspace and product topologies, with closure and interior as duals.

concepts.title: Continuity & homeomorphism
concepts.blurb: A map is continuous iff preimages of open sets are open — the coordinate-free definition. Homeomorphisms as the isomorphisms of Top.

concepts.title: Compactness
concepts.blurb: Every open cover has a finite subcover; preserved under continuous images; Heine–Borel, sequential compactness, and why compact Hausdorff is the right target category.

concepts.title: Connectedness
concepts.blurb: No separation into disjoint nonempty opens; path-connected implies connected; components partition the space.

concepts.title: Separation & countability
concepts.blurb: T1/Hausdorff/regular/normal, first- and second-countable; Urysohn's lemma and metrization as the payoff.
